Module chariot
Package chariot

Interface ClientAuth

All Superinterfaces:
Client
public sealed interface ClientAuth extends Client
ClientAuth provides authenticated access to the Lichess API.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface chariot.Client

    Client.Basic, Client.Scope

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AccountAuth
    account()
    Read and write account informations and preferences.
    AdminAuth
    admin()
    For administrators only, to obtain challenge tokens.
    BoardAuth
    board()
    Play on Lichess with physical boards and third-party clients.

    Play on Lichess as a bot.

    Relay chess events on Lichess.

    Send and receive challenges and manage bulk challenges.

    games()
    Access games and TV channels, played on Lichess.

    Access Lichess puzzle history and dashboard.

    Access and manage Lichess teams and their members.

    tournaments()
    Access Arena and Swiss tournaments played on Lichess.

  • Method Details

    • account

      AccountAuth account()
      Read and write account informations and preferences.
      Specified by:
      account in interface Client

    • admin

      AdminAuth admin()
      For administrators only, to obtain challenge tokens.

    • board

      BoardAuth board()
      Play on Lichess with physical boards and third-party clients.

      Works with normal Lichess accounts.
      Engine play or assistance is forbidden.

      Features

      • Stream incoming chess moves
      • Play chess moves
      • Read and write in the player and spectator chats
      • Receive, create and accept (or decline) challenges
      • Abort and resign games
      • Compatible with normal Lichess accounts

      Restrictions

      • Engine assistance, or any kind of outside help, is strictly forbidden
      • Time controls: Rapid, Classical and Correspondence only (Blitz possible for direct challanges and vs AI)

    • bot

      BotAuth bot()
      Play on Lichess as a bot.

      Allows engine play.
      Only works with Bot accounts.

      Features

      • Stream incoming chess moves
      • Play chess moves
      • Read and write in the player and spectator chats
      • Receive, create and accept (or decline) challenges
      • Abort and resign games
      • Engine assistance is allowed

      Restrictions

      • Bots can only play challenge games: pools and tournaments are off-limits
      • Bots cannot play UltraBullet (¼+0) because it requires making too many requests. But 0+1 and ½+0 are allowed.
      Specified by:
      bot in interface Client

    • broadcasts

      BroadcastsAuth broadcasts()
      Relay chess events on Lichess.

      Official broadcasts are maintained by Lichess, but you can create your own broadcasts to cover any live game or chess event. You will need to publish PGN on a public URL so that Lichess can pull updates from it. Alternatively, you can push PGN updates to Lichess using this API.

      Broadcasts are organized in tournaments, which have several rounds, which have several games. You must first create a tournament, then you can add rounds to them.

      Specified by:
      broadcasts in interface Client

    • challenges

      ChallengesAuth challenges()
      Send and receive challenges and manage bulk challenges.
      Specified by:
      challenges in interface Client

    • games

      GamesAuth games()
      Access games and TV channels, played on Lichess.
      Specified by:
      games in interface Client

    • puzzles

      PuzzlesAuth puzzles()
      Access Lichess puzzle history and dashboard.
      Specified by:
      puzzles in interface Client

    • teams

      TeamsAuth teams()
      Access and manage Lichess teams and their members.
      Specified by:
      teams in interface Client

    • tournaments

      TournamentsAuth tournaments()
      Access Arena and Swiss tournaments played on Lichess.

      Official tournaments are maintained by Lichess, but you can create your own tournaments as well.
      Specified by:
      tournaments in interface Client

    • users

      UsersAuth users()
      Access registered users on Lichess.
      Send messages to users.
      Specified by:
      users in interface Client
